message:
fix(io): add fail-closed completion guards to all AsyncWriteExt and AsyncSeekExt futures

Add `completed: bool` field and repoll guard to Write, WriteAll, WriteAllBuf,
WriteU8, WriteI8, Flush, Shutdown, WriteVectored, Seek, and all macro-generated
write_int futures (WriteU16..WriteF64Le). On repoll after completion, these now
return io::Error::other instead of silently re-delegating to the underlying I/O.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
